risks.description: Unauthorized user gains access to patent case data
risks.mitigation_strategy: JWT-based authentication with short expiry, RBAC enforcement on every API endpoint, audit logging of all access attempts
risks.residual_risk_justification: Residual risk limited to JWT token theft during valid session. Mitigated by short token expiry and session monitoring.
risks.kri_threshold: More than 5 unauthorized access attempts per hour from single IP

risks.description: Cross-tenant data leakage exposing confidential patent information
risks.mitigation_strategy: PostgreSQL Row-Level Security policies, tenant_id mandatory on all tables, automated cross-tenant penetration tests
risks.residual_risk_justification: RLS at database level provides defense-in-depth beyond application logic. Risk requires both application and database bypass.
risks.kri_threshold: Any cross-tenant query detected in audit log

risks.description: Unauthorized role performs restricted state transition (e.g., associate marks claim as FINAL)
risks.mitigation_strategy: State machine enforces role checks before transition, event store records actor_role on every transition, automated compliance scanning
risks.residual_risk_justification: State machine is the enforcement point, not a UI check. Bypass requires code-level compromise.
risks.kri_threshold: Any RBAC denial event for FINAL/FILED transitions

risks.description: Event store tampering or hash chain integrity compromise
risks.mitigation_strategy: Append-only event store with no UPDATE/DELETE permissions, SHA-256 hash chain, periodic integrity verification job
risks.residual_risk_justification: Requires database superuser access to tamper. Periodic hash verification detects any compromise.

risks.description: Filed document altered after filing, creating inconsistency between stored and filed version
risks.mitigation_strategy: Content hash recorded in event ledger at filing time, file storage is append-only (new version = new file), periodic hash re-verification
risks.residual_risk_justification: Hash mismatch detection is automated. Storage immutability prevents casual alteration.

risks.description: AI-generated content reaches filed status without human review, containing errors or hallucinations
risks.mitigation_strategy: State machine requires human review checkpoint between AI_DRAFT and FILED states, all AI outputs watermarked, AI sidecar never writes to evidence ledger directly
risks.residual_risk_justification: Human may approve without thorough review. Mitigated by requiring reviewer/partner role (licensed professionals) for approval.
risks.kri_threshold: AI draft acceptance rate exceeding 95% (suggests rubber-stamping)

risks.description: Claim amendment history lost, impacting prosecution history estoppel analysis
risks.mitigation_strategy: Every amendment emits CLAIM_AMENDED event with full diff, previous text, and new text. Events are immutable.
risks.residual_risk_justification: Event sourcing architecture guarantees completeness as long as events are properly emitted. Code review enforces emission.
risks.kri_threshold: Claim version gap detected (version N+2 without version N+1 event)

risks.description: Patent deadline missed, resulting in loss of patent rights
risks.mitigation_strategy: Multi-level escalation system (30/14/7/3/1 day warnings), PM2 dedicated worker with cron restart, incident auto-creation on miss, multi-channel notification (email + dashboard + escalation)
risks.residual_risk_justification: Multiple redundant warning levels. Incident process ensures accountability. Worker health monitoring prevents silent failures.
risks.kri_threshold: Any deadline reaching escalation level 3 (3 days remaining) or any DEADLINE_MISSED event

risks.description: Conflict of interest not detected, leading to professional ethics violation
risks.mitigation_strategy: Automated conflict check at case INTAKE (mandatory gate), fuzzy name matching, cross-case party search, partner-level override with documented justification
risks.residual_risk_justification: Fuzzy matching may miss name variations. Mitigated by periodic manual review of active case parties by compliance officer.
risks.kri_threshold: Any CONFLICT_OVERRIDE_APPROVED event (each requires manual review)
